name: templia-markdown-for-agents
description: Cloudflare Worker on templia.art/*. Routes: /api/availability (JSON availability parsed from Airbnb-synced iCal), /api/tzolkin/journey (Maya sacred calendar reading for a stay window), /.well-known/api-catalog (RFC 9727 linkset for API discovery). Content negotiation: Accept: text/markdown turns HTML responses into markdown via Workers AI toMarkdown, reproducing the native Markdown for Agents feature on the Free plan.
